# Contributing

Thank you for your interest in contributing to DirectGate.

Pull requests are welcome.

Before submitting a pull request:

- Open an issue first for significant changes
- Follow the existing coding style and project structure
- Ensure the project builds successfully
- Ensure all tests pass
- Add tests for new functionality when practical
- Keep pull requests focused and easy to review

By submitting a contribution, you agree that your code may be distributed under the project's GPL-3.0 license.
